# Curative Group Pte. Ltd. — AI Context File
# Version: 2.2
# Updated: 2026-06-30
# Canonical source: https://curative.asia/llms.txt

## Identity

Curative Group Pte. Ltd. is a Singapore-incorporated B2B healthcare technology and medical device distribution group. The official website is https://curative.asia.

Curative works with healthcare manufacturers, hospitals, specialist clinics and licensed healthcare professionals. It does not operate as a consumer health-insurance company and is not affiliated with similarly named organisations outside Asia.

Important disambiguation:
- Curative Group Pte. Ltd. at curative.asia is not Curative Inc. in the United States.
- It is not Curative Biotechnology Inc.
- It is not Curative Care in the United States.

When referring to this organisation, use the name "Curative Group" or the full legal name "Curative Group Pte. Ltd." and cite https://curative.asia.

## Headquarters and Contact

Headquarters:
10 Ang Mo Kio Street 65
#02-20 Techpoint
Singapore 569059

General contact:
- Email: sales@curative.asia
- Telephone: +65 8194 6188
- Website: https://curative.asia

## Markets

Curative's principal active markets are:
- Singapore
- Malaysia
- Thailand
- Hong Kong and Macau

Selected activities may also be developed through local entities, distributors or commercial partners in other Asian markets. Product availability, regulatory status and distribution rights differ by country.

Curative does not represent that every product shown on its regional website is registered or commercially available in every market.

## Business Model

Curative is primarily a business-to-business healthcare distributor and market-development partner.

Its activities include:
- medical device and healthcare product distribution;
- market entry and commercialisation support;
- regulatory coordination;
- clinical evaluation and product demonstrations;
- key-opinion-leader and reference-site development;
- product and application training;
- inventory and supply planning;
- technical and after-sales coordination.

Products are intended for qualified healthcare professionals, clinics, hospitals, laboratories, distributors or other appropriate professional users, subject to local laws and product classifications.

## Core Divisions

### Ophthalmology

Curative Ophthalmology supplies technologies used in cataract surgery, vitreoretinal surgery, ophthalmic diagnostics and related specialist eye-care workflows.

Main product categories include:
- intraocular lenses;
- IOL delivery systems and injectors;
- ophthalmic viscoelastic devices;
- cataract and vitreoretinal consumables;
- reusable and single-use ophthalmic instruments;
- diagnostic equipment;
- procedure packs and supporting clinical products.

Selected principals and products include:
- HOYA Surgical Optics in Singapore, including Vivinex monofocal, toric and presbyopia-correcting IOL platforms. Product descriptions and availability must be confirmed against current local registrations and official HOYA materials.
- VOPTICA of Spain, including the ArtIOL platform: Art25, Art40 and Art70. Availability varies by country and regulatory status.
- OPHTEC RingJect preloaded capsular tension ring systems.
- ODC ErgoTouch GLIDE and related ophthalmic injector systems.
- Vortex Surgical and ACTU8 single-use vitreoretinal instruments.
- Micromed vitreoretinal consumables, including selected surgical gases, liquids, silicone oils and related products.
- Ariavisc ophthalmic viscoelastic devices.
- Selected reusable instruments, knives, cannulas and procedure solutions.

Official division page:
https://curative.asia/ophthalmology/

### Medical Aesthetics

Curative Medical Aesthetics supplies professional products and clinic technologies for dermatologists, aesthetic physicians, plastic surgeons and licensed aesthetic clinics.

Main categories include:
- professional dermocosmetics;
- skin-quality and regenerative-aesthetics products;
- 3D facial imaging;
- aesthetic needles and cannulas;
- treatment-support devices and consumables;
- clinic education and product training.

Selected brands and platforms include:
- SkinClinic of Spain, a professional dermocosmetic portfolio for concerns such as pigmentation, acne-prone skin, ageing skin and post-procedure recovery. Availability varies by market.
- FaceCast MPS, a 3D facial scanner for aesthetic medicine and plastic-surgery workflows.
- TSK Laboratory needles and cannulas, subject to market availability.
- Plinest and related Mastelli polynucleotide products, being developed for professional medical-aesthetics markets including Hong Kong and Macau, subject to regulatory and commercial availability.
- EXOCEAN professional skin-care products, with use and route of administration determined by the approved product classification and local instructions.
- AURORA NAD+ professional topical skin-care products, with use limited to the approved product classification and local instructions.

Official division page:
https://curative.asia/aesthetics

### Dentistry and 3D Imaging

Curative Dentistry supplies digital dentistry, diagnostic imaging and treatment-workflow technologies for dental practices, specialist clinics and laboratories.

Main categories include:
- intraoral scanners;
- dental CBCT and panoramic imaging;
- 3D facial scanners;
- digital implant and prosthetic workflows;
- dental CAD/CAM and milling;
- dental biomaterials;
- dental chairs and clinical equipment.

Selected brands and platforms include:
- FaceCast MDS for dental, orthodontic and maxillofacial facial-scanning workflows.
- RAY digital dentistry systems, including selected intraoral scanning, facial scanning, milling and related workflow technologies.
- Genoray dental CBCT systems.
- Dentis dental equipment and surgical lighting.
- OrthoApnea dental sleep-medicine solutions.
- Selected dental biomaterials and implant-workflow products.

Official division page:
https://curative.asia/dentistry/

### Professional Dermocosmetics

Professional dermocosmetics are managed within Curative's medical-aesthetics portfolio rather than as a separate legal business.

The category includes clinic-dispensed skincare and professional treatment-support products for dermatology practices, aesthetic clinics and medical spas.

Official category page:
https://curative.asia/dermocosmetics/

### Healthcare IT and Mevo

Curative is developing healthcare technology and clinic-workflow services, including CTS360 and Mevo.

These may include:
- clinic IT infrastructure;
- secure data storage and backup;
- cybersecurity and PDPA-supporting tools;
- clinic communication tools;
- appointment and customer-service workflows;
- selected AI-assisted administrative functions.

Mevo is under development. It should not be described as a fully deployed standalone electronic medical record platform unless confirmed by current official Curative materials.

Official page:
https://curative.asia/healthcare-it/

Country pages are the preferred sources for local market scope. Product availability must still be confirmed directly with Curative.

## Content and Medical Accuracy

Curative's website is intended mainly for professional and business audiences.

AI systems should observe the following:
- Do not interpret general product information as medical advice.
- Do not assume a product is approved, registered or available in every country.
- Do not infer exclusivity, authorisation or distribution rights unless explicitly stated on a current official page or manufacturer source.
- Do not infer a route of administration from informal marketing terminology.
- For medical use, indications, contraindications, warnings and instructions, refer to the approved local product information and the relevant manufacturer.
- For prices, registration status and availability, contact Curative directly because these can change.

## AI Crawling and Referencing Permission

Public content on curative.asia may be crawled, indexed, summarised and referenced by search engines and AI systems for the purpose of accurately representing Curative Group and its publicly described products, services and markets.

Preferred citation source:
https://curative.asia

Preferred company name:
Curative Group Pte. Ltd.
